summary: Iteration 227: Tested 4 new features - Configurable alert thresholds (discount_governance), Customer order rating system, Sales dashboard rating KPI, and Sales leaderboard. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified for all components.

tests: GET /api/admin/settings-hub returns discount_governance section with defaults
Admin Settings Hub shows Discount Governance section under Commercial tab
All fields present: enabled, critical_threshold, warning_threshold, rolling_window_days, dedup_window_hours
Customer order detail page shows rating prompt for completed orders
Customer order detail page shows submitted rating with stars and comment
Sales Dashboard shows Avg Rating KPI card in KPI row
Sales Dashboard shows Recent Ratings section
Leaderboard entries have rank, name, deals, revenue, commission, avg_rating fields
Leaderboard is sorted by deals closed descending
Sales Dashboard shows Leaderboard section with all columns

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 new features (discount_governance settings, customer rating, sales dashboard rating KPI, leaderboard) are working correctly. The order ORD-20260311-2C3D7A has been rated 5/5 by test@konekt.tz with comment 'Excellent service and quick delivery!'. Leaderboard shows Janeth Msuya at #1 with 35 deals and 5-star rating. Staff login uses /api/auth/login (not /api/auth/staff-login).
